title: XRAYn't
description:
What if Xray was inconvenient?

XRAYn't: a silly resource pack for those looking for an original challenge
body:
# What if Xray was inconvenient?
## XRAYn't: a silly resource pack for those looking for an original challenge

You may wonder "How did you have this idea" and I'd tell you "idk I messed around with Blockbench". 

Anyway, here's my resource pack which features invisible ores, invisible creepers, and other inconvenient changes that I think you should find out by yourself!

Brought by yours truly, June.

_PS: Do not use this pack for cheating, consider it as a challenge for Minecraft_
